analysis: The project is a static website about black holes with a dark, cosmic theme. The current design includes animated slides and interactive elements, but it lacks a cohesive and immersive black hole theme. The CSS file has incomplete styles and animations, and the HTML and JavaScript files need to be fully completed to support the theme. The goal is to enhance the UI with a bulk animated object slide and animated page, focusing on black holes.

improvements.description: Complete the CSS file with a full dark, cosmic theme including animations for black hole visuals, swirling effects, and glowing elements. Ensure the CSS supports bulk animated objects and animated pages.

Complete the HTML content to ensure all sections are properly included, such as the main content area with interactive planets, animated slides, and other sections related to black holes. Add a mobile-friendly navigation menu with a hamburger icon for better usability on mobile devices.

Fix the syntax errors in the showSlide function and complete the JavaScript content to ensure all functions are properly implemented. Add event listeners and functionality for the new buttons added in test-website/index.html. Ensure the script supports bulk animated objects and animated pages.
